email_body:
Beste Lien Lambrechts,

Graag solliciteer ik naar de stage digitale marketing & communicatie bij Déhora Consultancy Group. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, contentcreatie en WordPress, ben ik enthousiast om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor jullie campagnes.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik websites in WordPress. Daarnaast heb ik met mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data en GEO om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik schrijf vlot in het Nederlands (B1, in opleiding) en Engels, en ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen.

Ik ben leergierig, neem initiatief en werk graag samen. Ik hoop mijn creativiteit en technische kennis te kunnen inzetten voor Déhora. Ik hoor graag of we kunnen kennismaken.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Lien Lambrechts,

I would like to apply for the digital marketing & communication internship at Déhora Consultancy Group. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content creation, and WordPress, I am excited to contribute to your campaigns.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress websites. I also worked on mirook.com with structured data and GEO to improve visibility in AI-powered search. I write fluently in Dutch (B1, currently studying) and English, and I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

I am eager to learn, take initiative, and enjoy teamwork. I hope to bring my creativity and technical skills to Déhora. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Lien Lambrechts,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor stage digitale marketing & communicatie bij Déhora Consultancy Group. Jullie oproep voor een stagiair die échte verantwoordelijkheid krijgt en creatief mag bijdragen aan campagnes, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

Momenteel werk ik als junior digital marketer bij Episto, waar ik verantwoordelijk ben voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogs en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-websites. Ik gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd hoe ik content strategisch kan inzetten voor maximale impact.

Jullie stage biedt precies wat ik zoek: de kans om mijn vaardigheden in copywriting, social media en online campagnes verder te ontwikkelen in een dynamisch team. Ik schrijf vlot in het Nederlands (B1, met actieve taalcursus) en Engels, en ik woon in Zwijndrecht, op fietsafstand van Antwerpen. Ik ben zelfstandig, neem initiatief en werk graag samen – eigenschappen die ik graag inzet voor jullie communicatieprojecten.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn creativiteit en technische kennis te combineren met jullie missie om organisaties te inspireren. Ik hoop dat we kunnen kennismaken om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Lien Lambrechts,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the digital marketing & communication internship at Déhora Consultancy Group. Your call for an intern who gets real responsibility and can creatively contribute to campaigns aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

Currently, I work as a junior digital marketer at Episto, where I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blogs, and building and maintaining WordPress websites. I use tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, I worked on my own project mirook.com with structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This experience has taught me how to strategically use content for maximum impact.

Your internship offers exactly what I am looking for: the chance to further develop my skills in copywriting, social media, and online campaigns in a dynamic team. I write fluently in Dutch (B1, with an active language course) and English, and I live in Zwijndrecht, cycling distance from Antwerp. I am independent, take initiative, and enjoy teamwork – qualities I am eager to apply to your communication projects.

I look forward to combining my creativity and technical knowledge with your mission to inspire organizations. I hope we can meet to discuss my motivation further.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for client websites (Episto)
• WordPress site building and maintenance (Elementor, Astra) including content management
• Structured data (JSON-LD schema) and GEO/AEO implementation for AI search visibility (mirook.com)
• Social media content integration and coordination (Instagram, Facebook)
• Analytics tools: SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Search Console, Google Ads
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
